_schema: The Old School ripple chain's spine (CHARACTERS_SPEC ripple 2). Fires the evening before a storm. Helping costs real time blocks and sets storm_helped_hollis - the flag the legacy contract requires.

intro.speaker: hollis
intro.text: Storm's coming hard tonight. Low field'll flood if I don't get bags down before dark. I wouldn't be standing here if I had enough hands.

options.text: "I'll come. My place can wait a night."
"I can't leave my own place exposed tonight. I hate saying it, but I can't."

helped.speaker: hollis
helped.text: Water came up mean, but it didn't come through.

declined.speaker: hollis
declined.text:
Then tend your place.

I'll tend mine.
